headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Devon Energy, Raises Price Target to $66
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Gabe Daoud   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $63 to $66.

headline: Stone Ridge tables $8bn bid for Devon Energy’s Marcellus assets
summary: Devon Energy received the offer shortly after completing its $58bn all-stock merger with Coterra Energy last month.
